prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VW EA827 2.0L 16V (ABF) code** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ARP head studs) and a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbo** running 1.2 bar boost on a **Bosch 0280155849 3-bar MAP sensor**, paired with a **Siemens DEKA 60lb/hr fuel injectors** and **AEM 340LPH fuel pump** for E85 compatibility. Custom **Schrick 268/272 camshafts** and **Supertech valvetrain** with titanium retainers for high-RPM stability.

Full **3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** with a **Supersprint 4-2-1 header** and **Scorpion 200-cell catalytic converter**, mated to a **Remus Powerizer rear muffler** for aggressive tone without drone. **034 Motorsport engine mounts** and **Neuspeed torque arm insert** to eliminate drivetrain slop under load.

Standalone **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** and **Motec C125 dash** for real-time monitoring. **KW Clubsport coilovers** with **034 Motorsport sway bars** and **Whiteline adjustable endlinks** for chassis rigidity. **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** with **330mm slotted rotors** up front and **280mm solid rotors** in the rear, paired with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (Parati-specific, not Golf/Jetta) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **rear diffuser** by **Seibon**. **OEM+ Euro-spec Parati G60 front bumper** with **Hella 500 fog lights** and **custom LED DRLs** integrated into the grille. **Volk TE37SL 17x9 +20 wheels** in **Gunmetal** with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires** (225/40/17).

**Full custom interior** with **Recaro SRD-E seats** (Parati-specific mounting brackets) wrapped in **Alcantara with red stitching**, **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** with **NRG quick-release hub**, and **custom roll cage** by **Custom Cages UK** (bolt-in, no welding). **OMP pedal set** and **Apexi Power FC-style shift knob** with **short shifter** by **DieselGeek Sigma 6**.

**Custom livery** by **Fatlace Designs** featuring **VW Motorsport-inspired graphics** with **matte black roof** and **gloss black mirror caps**. **Smoked Hella tail lights** with **LED conversion** and **custom rear wiper delete**. **Carbon fiber hood** by **VIS Racing** with **functional NACA ducts** for engine bay cooling. **Aerocatch hood pins** and **custom aluminum fuel filler door** by **034 Motorsport**.
